package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for make_map_inside_hot_loop_same_shape: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: make(map[K]V, ...) scratch maps recreated inside loops instead of being reused or prebuilt.
type CaseMakeMapInsideHotLoopSameShapeDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMakeMapInsideHotLoopSameShapeModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMakeMapInsideHotLoopSameShapeRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMakeMapInsideHotLoopSameShapeModel
}

type CaseMakeMapInsideHotLoopSameShapeService struct {
    repo *CaseMakeMapInsideHotLoopSameShapeRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMakeMapInsideHotLoopSameShapeAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMakeMapInsideHotLoopSameShape(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMakeMapInsideHotLoopSameShapeDTO) error {
    focus := "make_map_inside_hot_loop"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    seen := make(map[string]bool, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { seen[item.ID] = true }
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    make_map_inside_hot_loop_negative := map[string]int{"make": 1, "map": 2, "inside": 3, "hot": 4, "loop": 5, "shape": 6}
    make_map_inside_hot_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    make_negative_0 := make_map_inside_hot_loop_negative["make"] + len(input)
    _ = make_negative_0
    map_negative_1 := make_map_inside_hot_loop_negative["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_negative_1
    inside_negative_2 := make_map_inside_hot_loop_negative["inside"] + len(input)
    _ = inside_negative_2
    hot_negative_3 := make_map_inside_hot_loop_negative["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_negative_3
    for loop_negative_4Index, item := range items { make_map_inside_hot_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_4Index }
    shape_negative_5 := make_map_inside_hot_loop_negative["shape"] + len(input)
    _ = shape_negative_5
    return nil
}
